violations.detail: repo name `Configra` does not match any ADR-023 substrate pattern
violations.remediation: Rename to one of: pheno-*-lib, phenotype-*-sdk, phenotype-*-framework, or move under federated-service namespace.

warnings.detail: repo name `Configra` does not match any ADR-023 substrate pattern
warnings.remediation: Rename to one of: pheno-*-lib, phenotype-*-sdk, phenotype-*-framework, or move under federated-service namespace.

_linter.notes: Linter's ADR-023 naming-convention regex (^(pheno|phenotype)-?[A-Z]...$) does not match `Configra` (no pheno/phenotype prefix; capitalised first letter). This is a known false negative flagged in the L73 rubric — the linter name-pattern predates ADR-031's Configra canonical-name decision. The repo IS the canonical config substrate per ADR-031: the `phenotype-config` repo was absorbed (L5-110, merge 3f12e254), KooshaPari/pheno#238 re-pointed sub-crate CANONICAL.md markers, and 7 prior config-shaped repos (Conft, Settly, pheno-config-local, etc.) live under ABSORBED-FROM/. PROMOTION.md Gate 1/2/3 evaluations document sdk-tier readiness: 2+ polyglot consumers (Rust: pheno-* fleet via pheno-config 0.2.0; TypeScript: typescript/packages; Python: pheno-py-extra config adapters), stable API since pheno-config 0.1.0 (2026-03-25), no breaking changes in 2026 Q1/Q2, CHANGELOG.md present at crates/pheno-config/CHANGELOG.md and crates/settly/CHANGELOG.md. A linter patch (pheno-framework-lint v1.1) to add a passthrough for `Configra` is filed as a follow-up ADR-050 candidate.
